reset_desc: All progress will be permanently deleted!
warning_panel: You can't go back before finishing {MAP_NAME}!
air_warning: Where Are You Going Without Turning Off Airplane Mode?
extra_hints_1: We're not solving quantum physics. Press that huge button and go through the opened door. If you want a clue even in this, we will be hurt a lot in the future...
What is done is done, sometimes there is no turning back in life. Just like how it is in this Level, Forget about the past, push the button and move on
Move your focus higher, the exit is taking shape somewhere there.
The only intelligence we have is this little piece of map. Study carefully this section that shows you where you should jump. The rest of the map is entirely up to your reflexes and memorization.

This route in front of you is not your only reality, it is just the first option you focus on. Don't pause when gravity bends... Your acceleration should already be taking shape in the void as you change direction.
The game doesn't play itself, dude. Instead of watching from the sidelines and waiting for the door to take pity on you, how about you reach out to the screen and drag that door open?
To reach the exit, you first need to grab that green looking thing, it is a key. What does a key do? YES! BRILLIANT, a key opens a door! Now go open that door!

This key doesn't like to give in that easy. When it runs away from you, don't you think that you've made a mistake and give up; it's yelling 'Catch me if you can!' Now go and make sure that key knows its place, eventually it will get tired and give up... hopefully

After taking the tool that opens the doors, i guess you understand what I am talking about... And then jumping all the way back and going down from there to pass through obstacles is just one of the ways offered to you. Choose your own risk, but remember: If you want to survive, you have to make that double jump with perfect timing, not randomly
The blind has surrendered to the darkness, the mute to tranquility... It is up to you to complete the trilogy to open the passage. Reset all echoes and embrace the true deafness in this scene.

Constant jumping exhausts the body; every step you take on the plain brings you lower. The only way to recharge your strength is to fall from top to bottom. The small gap next to the door? It's just left for you to reach the door effortlessly.
This is as far as the keys can take you. Sometimes you need to take fate directly into your own hands, instead of relying on intermediaries.
extra_hints_2: You can't be in two places at once. Use your strength to push the box over the edge and let him press the button instead of you.
The curse in this area has weakened the physical form of the door. You don't need to drag the box; go straight through it!
Tilt your phone to drop the box. Don't have a sensor? Touch controls will automatically turn on 75 seconds after the episode starts.
Holding down the button will not work here. You are in the army now! Press the left and right buttons alternately to move towards the door.
The side entrance is closed. Climb the platforms above the door, stand still, and let the falling ceiling lower you to the exit.
Forget everything. In this room, buttons press boxes. Position the box on the floor, climb up and drop the button for him to press.
Stop creating conspiracy theories. There is no hidden trap or password on the screen. You will just press the button and pass, do not strain your brain so much.
The controls are not broken, it's just that your perceptions are too 'flat'. Turn left to go right, right to go left... It really makes me sad that you can't even grasp such a simple contrast
You may have noticed that the door does not open on its own. Keep jumping on the button. But do not stop, otherwise the door will return to where it started. I wish you had done some conditioning!
Stop looking back. That road is already closed. Your only option is to overcome the obstacles in front of you, if you have the capacity to do it!

Are you still going back and forth to the menu and waiting for the door to open? I've underestimated your level of intelligence. To solve this paradox, you need to leave this universe completely. So I'm saying; close the game completely, press the icon again with your tiny finger and enter the game. Maybe then I'll feel sorry for you passing.

There is an invisible border on the screen. Every time you cross that border, gravity reverses, if you step back, it returns to normal. It's the light switch logic you know. Don't make yourself dizzy by going back and forth all the time, just memorize where the limit is and move forward.
gyro_extra_hint: Forget the laws of physics, manually hold and drag the box.
